description: Drawing from basic minimalism, this Basic fragrance from nike fragrances, for women adds a touch of downtown cool with its mixed tones. Reminiscent of the retro-esque mood of the moment, this eau de toilette, bottled in a delectable flask, is best for casual outings. Quantity: 75 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
